transcript: Yeah, what'll you give me on, like, a... a hound bowel... in cash?
Yeah, what'll you give me on a... dog bowel? How much?
Well, yeah... they've been cleansed. Fully cleansed.
What'd you give me on that, for a thirty day basis?
I... what would I wanna... what would I wanna do with a dog bowels?
Well, sell them. You know, med st--
What would I sell them for?
Just, like... I guess, forty, fifty percent above what you pay me.
Well, I mean, what would... what... who would want to buy those?
I don't know... med students? Uh...
Oh, med students would wanna buy dog bowels?
I... this is Larimer Street, man, I wouldn't get into that shit. Thanks anyway.
Well, no, you'll accept 'em. But you--
Yeah, I was looking for a pawn on a bronchial tube.
What's the... what's the kick here? Why do you keep callin'?
Okay, we're gonna trace this call if you keep callin'.
I'll give you my phone number, if you need to come over and look at it, or--
I don't have to do that, I can have the police come over.
Yeah, what'll you give me on a dog bowel? How much?
I don't buy shit like that, okay? I buy tools.
No, you'll buy it. How much you'll give me on it?
I don't want to give you anything on it.
Yeah, uh, I have bronchial tubes of the dog. What'll you... how much you give me on that?
Well, no. You'll... you'll buy this. I'm just saying, how much?
How much'd you give me on it, sir?
I don't buy it! I only buy tools!
Well, you will buy this. That's...
Bring it down, let me see it.
How much cash you give me on it, man?
No, I don't... I don't quote a price on the phone. You don't buy a car over the phone.
Well, yeah... yeah I do. And you will give me a quote.
No, you won't. You bring it down, I'll... and let me take a look at it.
No, I don't quote anything over the phone.
Yeah, uh... what'll you give me on just the bowel alone?
I said I won't quote a price on the phone. And if you call again, I'm gonna get pissed off. Okay?
Well, sir, just give me a quote, and--
Get off the goddamned phone, and don't call me anymore.
How much will you give me for the bowel, sir?
No! Get off the fuckin' phone. You understand?
No! Get off the fuckin' phone.
